title: meringium merrillii
side_effects: Meringium merrillii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and nausea, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to kidney damage and increased blood pressure, which may result in heart problems. In some cases, improper use of meringium merrillii has been linked to headaches, dizziness, and even seizures. Additionally, consuming large quantities of the plant can cause liver damage and may interact with certain medications, exacerbating their side effects.
